description: Letter sent from Alexandria by Shemuel b. Aharon to Abu Ishaq Avraham b. Moshe in Fustat, explaining why he could not send the silk which he had dyed with gold, and sending greetings, though without mentioning his own name, probably because his handwriting was known to the recipient. (Information from Mediterranean Society, V, pp. 241, 573)
description_he: מכתב שנשלח מאלכסנדריה על ידי שמואל ב' אהרון לאבו יצחק אברהם ב' משה בפוסטאט, מסביר מדוע לא יכול לשלוח את המשי שצבע בזהב.
